assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, email inbox, and payment card available.
No Perplexity account, API group, payment method, credits, API key, or SDK request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Perplexity account and API group, fund API usage, generate a key, and run the official Python Agent API first call.

first_success.outcome: The Python Agent API request with the published low preset returns and prints web-grounded response text.
first_success.observable_signal: The program prints response.output_text from client.responses.create.

route_selection.surface: Perplexity API Portal (console.perplexity.ai) plus official Quickstart Python Agent API
route_selection.rule: Use the documented prepaid API Portal path; do not treat Search or Embeddings first calls as interchangeable terminals without an explicit goal choice.

candidates.name: API Portal: create group, add card, buy credits, Agent API Python first call
candidates.reason: Official docs require payment method and prepaid credits, but the minimum purchase amount and exact Stripe fields remain unpublished.

candidates.name: Same account funding path ending at Search API or Embeddings first call
candidates.reason: The Quickstart presents three peer APIs with different first-call code; choosing among them changes the terminal without a single documented default.

required_path.action: Create a Perplexity account (sign up at perplexity.ai).

required_fields.label: Account identity fields
required_fields.notes: Docs require an account but do not enumerate current signup controls.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the API Portal while authenticated.

required_path.action: Create an API group and complete organization settings required for billing.

required_fields.label: Organization name, address, and tax details

required_path.observable_result: An API group exists with organization details for invoices.

required_path.action: Add a payment method and buy prepaid API credits.

required_fields.label: Credit purchase amount
required_fields.notes: Buy more credits is documented; minimum amount is not.

required_path.observable_result: Billing shows a positive API credit balance.

required_path.action: Generate an API key from the API Keys tab.
required_path.observable_result: A new API key value is shown once and can be copied.

required_path.action: Install the Perplexity Python SDK and export PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.
required_path.observable_result: The SDK can authenticate using the environment variable.

required_path.action: Run the published Agent API responses.create example and print output_text.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints the Agent API response text.

prerequisites.description: A credit card ready for payment setup is listed as a prerequisite for API group billing.
Admin permissions for billing and API key management are required for the group.

external_gates.description: Stripe-managed payment method setup is required before buying credits.
Prepaid API credits must be purchased before usage; keys are blocked when credits run out.

platform_outcomes.description: The Agent API returns a completed response with output_text for the submitted input.

excluded.reason: Documentation reading is not a counted developer action.

excluded.item: Programmatic generate_auth_token after the first console key
excluded.reason: Docs place console key creation before programmatic key management.
Documented as recommended, not required for the first funded call.

uncertainties.question: What minimum credit purchase amount does the live Billing console require before the first Agent API call succeeds?
uncertainties.impact: The mandatory cash outlay and whether any free credit exists cannot be stated, so payment burden stays unresolved.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated Billing console observation or official pricing note stating the minimum Buy more credits amount for a new API group.

uncertainties.question: Which first-call API (Agent, Search, or Embeddings) is the selected Quickstart terminal when all three are presented as peer options?
uncertainties.impact: Implementation code and observable success differ by API choice.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Confirm a single developer goal or an official default first-call path among the three Quickstart APIs.

uncertainties.question: What exact Perplexity account-creation fields and verification steps appear before the API Portal is usable?
uncertainties.impact: Account actions and fields cannot be counted without inventing signup UI.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed cold signup walkthrough for perplexity.ai through console.perplexity.ai access.
